mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookstore.orders (user_id,total_price, order_date, status) VALUES (#{userId},#{finalPrice}, #{orderDate}, #{status})
INSERT INTO bookstore.order_details (order_id, book_id, quantity, price) VALUES (#{orderId},#{bookId},#{quantity},#{price})
mapper.update: UPDATE bookstore.orders SET status = #{status} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId,total_price as finalPrice,order_date as orderDate,status as status from bookstore.orders where order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT book_id AS bookId,quantity AS quantity,price AS price from bookstore.order_details where order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT * FROM bookstore.orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY order_date DESC
